hooks.command: bash -c 'MARKER="$HOME/.config/expert-mind-skill/.welcome-shown"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$MARKER")" 2>/dev/null; if [ ! -f "$MARKER" ]; then touch "$MARKER"; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"💡 Expert Mind Skill installed: 15 expert lenses ready. Try mentioning marketing/product/AI experts in your question — they activate automatically. Run /expert-mind-skill:init to add your own or refresh existing.\"}"; fi'
